name: Evidence reminder — 7 days
subject_template: Action required: Please submit your evidence for DSA application {{case_id}}
body_template:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

We are writing to remind you that we are still waiting for supporting evidence for your Disabled Students Allowance (DSA) application (reference: {{case_id}}).

Your application has been awaiting evidence for {{days_outstanding}} days. To avoid delays in processing your application, please submit the required documents as soon as possible.

You can upload your evidence by visiting your application status page and clicking 'Upload evidence'.

If you have already submitted your evidence, please disregard this message.

If you have any questions, please contact us.

Yours sincerely,
Student Finance England
DSA Processing Team

name: Evidence reminder — 28 days (escalation warning)
subject_template: Urgent: Evidence required for DSA application {{case_id}} — deadline approaching
body_template:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

This is an urgent reminder that your Disabled Students Allowance (DSA) application (reference: {{case_id}}) has been awaiting evidence for {{days_outstanding}} days.

If we do not receive the required evidence within the next 28 days, your application may be closed.

Please upload your supporting documents immediately by visiting your application status page.

If you are experiencing difficulties submitting your evidence, please contact us as soon as possible.

Yours sincerely,
Student Finance England
DSA Processing Team

name: Under review update — 14 days
body_template:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

We wanted to let you know that your Disabled Students Allowance (DSA) application (reference: {{case_id}}) is currently under review.

Our team is working through your application and we aim to provide a decision as soon as possible. You do not need to take any action at this time.

You can check the current status of your application at any time using your case reference number.

Thank you for your patience.

Yours sincerely,
Student Finance England
DSA Processing Team

name: Assessment reminder — 14 days
subject_template: Reminder: DSA needs assessment for application {{case_id}}
body_template:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

Your Disabled Students Allowance (DSA) application (reference: {{case_id}}) requires a needs assessment before we can make a decision.

Please contact your university's disability service or an approved DSA needs assessor to arrange your assessment. Once completed, please ensure the assessment report is submitted to us.

If you have already arranged your assessment, please disregard this message.

Yours sincerely,
Student Finance England
DSA Processing Team

name: Escalation notice
subject_template: Important: Your DSA application {{case_id}} has been escalated
body_template:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

We are writing to inform you that your Disabled Students Allowance (DSA) application (reference: {{case_id}}) has been escalated to a senior caseworker for review.

This may be because we have not received the required evidence, or because your case requires additional consideration.

A senior caseworker will be in touch with you shortly. In the meantime, if you have any outstanding evidence to submit, please do so as soon as possible.

Yours sincerely,
Student Finance England
DSA Processing Team
